title: GROUP_ADD member cap check is not atomic with add_group_member
description: ws.rs GROUP_ADD: member_count() is checked (<= MAX_GROUP_MEMBERS), then add_group_member() is called in a separate query. Two concurrent GROUP_ADD requests for the same group can both observe count=99, both pass the cap check, and both insert, leaving the group at 101 members. Fix: enforce the cap with a conditional INSERT inside a single transaction (INSERT only if COUNT(*) < 100).
